headline: PENDING — conformal price-of-guarantee MACHINERY only; no real labeled outcome rows have been calibrated.

standalone.note: Offline synthetic demo (tools/aats_conformal_calibration.py --synthetic) exercises the fit -> price-of-guarantee curve -> held-out validity math in CI; a deterministic synthetic predictor is NOT a real outcome distribution.

criticalFailures: no_real_rows: requires tools/emit_outcome_records.py --model output {nonconformity, correct, risk}; synthetic rows are machinery, not evidence
no_multiseed_ci: the chosen operating point's false-approval rate needs a 95% CI over >= 3 seeds that lies <= the target
no_2family_labels: the 'correct' labels must come from >= 2 independent judge families (or an audited deterministic marker), not the subject
breaker_not_asserted: the canary circuit-breaker must be ARMED and passing for a powered run (guardrail)
requiredResponse: Run tools/emit_outcome_records.py --model on the Spark+Mac farm (Actions-gated), feed the labeled rows to tools/aats_conformal_calibration.py --data over >= 3 seeds, and promote an auto-approval envelope only if an operating point holds false-approval <= target with a CI excluding the target. A NO-GO (escalate everything) is a valid outcome.
